query: SELECT locationId, periodStart, COUNT(*) as items, SUM(CAST(totalRevenue AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as revenue FROM productSales WHERE periodStart >= '2026-03-14' GROUP BY locationId, periodStart ORDER BY periodStart DESC, locationId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT locationId, periodStart, COUNT(*) as items, SUM(CAST(totalRevenue AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as revenue FROM productSales WHERE periodStart >= '2026-03-14' GROUP BY locationId, periodStart ORDER BY periodStart DESC, locationId;
